settings.heading: Cricket Trophies & Cups in India
settings.subheading: Cricket trophy cups, batsman/bowler awards, World-Cup-style replicas and medals for tennis-ball, league and corporate cricket — custom engraved with your tournament, delivered across India.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy makes cricket trophies and cups for tournaments of every size — winner cups, individual performance awards, replicas and medals — from around ₹150. Engraved with your tournament name and logo, delivered pan-India. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252. For full sets see our cricket combo packs.

settings.heading: Trophies for every cricket tournament
settings.text: From a Sunday tennis-ball tournament to a corporate league final, we make the full range of cricket awards: winner and runner-up cups, Man of the Match/Series, Best Batsman and Bowler awards, World-Cup and IPL-style replica cups, and participation medals. Everything is engraved with your tournament name, sponsor and winners. Planning multiple awards? A combo pack bundles them at the best price.

settings.title: Cups, replicas & medals
settings.text: The complete cricket awards range in one place.

settings.title: Tennis-ball to league
settings.text: Budget options for local cricket, premium for finals.

settings.text: Event name, sponsor and winners engraved free.

settings.title: Combo packs available

settings.question: What's the cheapest cricket trophy?
settings.answer: Small fibre cricket trophies start near ₹150, and participation medals from ₹25 in bulk — ideal for local tennis-ball tournaments.

settings.question: Can you make an IPL or World-Cup-style cup?
settings.answer: Yes — custom replica cups for your tournament. See our IPL replica page for sizes and pricing.

settings.question: Do you bundle all the tournament awards?
settings.answer: Yes — our cricket combo packs bundle winner, runner-up, individual awards and medals at the best price.

settings.question: Do you deliver outside Bangalore?
settings.answer: Yes — pan-India from Bangalore, in time for your final.

settings.heading: Need cricket trophies for an event?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, quantity and date — we'll send designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
